message:
docs: correct robot state panes envelope (ft-iaafy)

README.md and AGENTS.md documented `ft robot state` as returning
`data: { panes: [...] }`, but the actual handler at
crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs:16977-16979 serializes `data` as a
bare `Vec<PaneState>` for the non---include-text path via
`RobotResponse::success(states, ...)`. Only the --include-text
branch (16967-16974) wraps panes in `RobotStateWithTextData` with
`tail_lines` / `escapes_included` / `pane_text` siblings.

Update the Quick Example and the Response envelope block to show
the bare-array success shape, and call out the distinct
--include-text wrapper in AGENTS.md so callers do not over-fit their
parsers to the object form.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
